tests.note: Backend tests for favoriteRoads pass. UI tests cannot run due to pre-existing test infrastructure issues (jest → vitest migration incomplete).

typecheck.note: Pre-existing TypeScript errors in test files due to jest to vitest migration. Component itself compiles correctly.

lint.note: Pre-existing ESLint configuration issue with react-native plugin. Not caused by US-043 changes.

acceptance_criteria_met: AC1: Sheet renders with 'Save as Favorite' title and name input
AC2: Mutation called, sheet closes on success
AC3: Validation error shown for empty name (min 1 char, max 50)
AC4: Error message displayed on save failure, sheet stays open
patterns_followed: Used Input and Button components from components/ui/
Used semantic theme tokens (no hardcoded values)
Showed loading state during save operation
Showed error message on save failure
